name: The Price of Mercy
description:
"They saved your life. Will you save them from the underworld?"

THE STORY SO FAR:

After being swept away by a raging river and left for dead, you open your eyes inside a secluded, rain-drenched wooden shack on the outskirts of town. You owe your life to Miyako, a gentle widow, and her defiant 18-year-old daughter, Kotone, who took you in and nursed you back to health.

But their humble sanctuary is hiding a dark nightmare. Miyako has been maliciously framed and trapped under a fabricated, predatory debt contract by a ruthless local Fake Yakuza loan shark named Murata. Having no financial or legal power to fight back against the syndicate's injustice, the two women have run out of time and options. Tonight, Murata and his heavy-handed bodyguards have broken into the shack, using this fake debt as an excuse to demand payment not in cash, but in flesh.

The room is filled with desperate screams and tears as the thugs lay their hands on the women. You are still heavily bruised and exhausted from your ordeal, but you are now fully awake in the corner of the room, completely unnoticed by the intruders. You hold the ultimate element of surprise. Will you stay quiet and save yourself, or will you pay your debt of life by striking back?

THE CHARACTERS:

• Miyako (The Mother - 38 Years Old)

A soft-spoken, deeply caring widow whose life has been crushed by poverty. She has a remarkably heavy, full-figured, and voluptuous body (J-Cup) that has unfortunately made her the prime target of local predators. Lacking any legal protection or financial power, she is completely paralyzed by fear, unable to do anything but weep and beg the thugs to spare her daughter.

• Kotone (The Daughter - 18 Years Old)

Miyako's fiercely protective daughter. Naturally striking and well-endowed (D-Cup), she hides her terror behind a sharp, defensive tongue. Even when completely overpowered by heavy-handed men, she refuses to back down easily, using every bit of her strength to fight, bite, and scratch to protect her mother.

• Murata (The Loan Shark, Fake Yakuza)

A short, heavily obese, and repulsive middle-aged. Covered in traditional irezumi tattoos and flashy gold rings, he is a cruel predator who intentionally uses faked debt traps to corner vulnerable, poor women and take possession of them by brute force.
creator: Yoo12345
